name: EasyMovie Subscription
description: Integrates EasyMovie subscription status with Jellyfin playback. Controls media access based on user subscription status and displays subscription-specific preroll videos before content.

versions.changelog:
🐛 Bug Fixes

- Fixed IIntroProvider logging (use ILoggerFactory)
- Simplified configuration save (use alert instead of Dashboard.alert)
- Added diagnostic logging for service registration
- Enabled autoUpdate for automatic plugin updates

🐛 Bug Fixes

- Fixed configuration save clearing all fields
- Configuration now reloads properly after save
- Added error handling for save operations

🐛 Bug Fixes

- Fixed logo not displaying (removed hardcoded imagePath)
- Fixed version detection issues
- Jellyfin now auto-detects logo location

🐛 Bug Fixes

- Fixed blank configuration page
- Updated HTML structure to match Jellyfin 10.11.6 format
- Added field descriptions for all settings

🐛 Bug Fixes

- Fixed configuration page not appearing
- Improved plugin page registration

✨ Initial Release

- Subscription status integration with EasyMovie API
- Preroll video injection based on subscription state
- Content blocking for expired subscriptions
- Trial user detection and handling
- Fail-safe mode (defaults to active on API errors)
